violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets of the kitchen 2-door reach-in and the bar juice cold hold were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. Ice machine must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024

The floor and wall junctures around the ice machine do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Coving must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2023
